meaning: n.残余,剩余物,其他的人,[数]余数v.廉价出售adj.剩余的,出售剩书的
examples: He gulped down the remainder of his coffee.
Efforts to persuade the remainder to follow suit have continued.
His widow became a virtual recluse for the remainder of her life.
The issues will be "explored fully by the BOA board and management team during the remainder of 2010".
Here the parents buy a lifetime interest and the children buy the remainder interest.
